calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: J. P. Harbour for Ida McCray.

The Court stated that the petition was previoulsy presented to the Court and denied in July of 2011. The Court also stated that it appears Health and Safety Code section 103450 and 103451 is not appropriate for the remedy Counsel is seeking. Counsel presented oral argument to support his position and explained circumstances. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ida McCray in Propria Persona.

The Court denied the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage stating that the petition would be appropriate only if the marriage was not registered or if a certified copy of the marriage certificate was not obtainable.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
